name: drone-field
description: Wide low-density spatial smear with slow ugly motion and long event tails.

sections.name: haze
sections.intent: Sparse low-motion sources establish an unpleasant room tone.

sections.name: pressure
sections.intent: Density rises without losing the slow-drone identity.

sections.name: residue
sections.intent: Events thin out and leave abrasive stereo and height-channel ghosts.

example_command: cargo run -- piece --output out/drone-field.wav --scene drone-field --random-preset stable --seed 41001
